entry.title: Change Profit Center before PO creation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to change the profit center when I click the save button to create purchased order.

I try to use Badi ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST - PROCESS_ACCOUNT method. But it is not work.

I checked the coding part, when the program execute the set_data method, there is a default value 'X' for the my_cust_firewall_on  parameter. It cause the update failed. 

No idea how to change this field correctly.

entry.title: Sorting Method not working for Correspondence - Periodic Account Statement
entry.content:
Hi Team

We need your guidance to apply sorting and get the line items sorted as per the document date on generating correspondence for customer account statement. We are using the standard sorting method for correspondence P1/P2/P3/P4 and all are giving the same results. The list generated is not sorted properly. We tried creating one sample sorting method Z1 to sort the line items based on document date only but its also not giving the expected results

Please help us to resolve this issue asap. Thank you

entry.title: Pricing error in item 000010 in VF03.
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

In T.code VF03, When I entered the billing document 9285324272, I am getting the error"Pricing error in item 000010" I checked the tab conditions, Condition type PI01-Intercompany price is displaying "Condition type PI01 is not determined using condition records" and also I clicked on analysis , it displays " Condition record is missing".

In Condition type ZPRS- Internal price Condition type ZPRS-Intenal price is displaying "Condition type ZPRS is not determined using condition records"also I clicked on analysis , it displays " Condition record is missing".

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Why negative credit exposure in open orders and deliveries.
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have been having an issue in which negative values ​​are appearing in customers' credit exposure. When this happens I run the UKM_COMMITMENT_REBUILD program, but after 1 month it happens again.

Does anyone know why this happens and if there is any way to prevent this from happening?

entry.title: Over-Delivery Qty Tolerance with the customer credit management
entry.content:
Hi all, Hope you are all doing well

There is a case when the credit limit for the customer is 100K $ and he already consumed 90K $ of the credit limit, then the customer requested a sales order with 10K $ with the remaining credit limit and he can release his order successfully, but in the outbound delivery level, the material was having a tolerance 5% more, which means the order value increased with 500 $ more than the customer credit limit.

What I need is to know if there are any functionality in the standard or customized way can make the system to allow to exceed the customer credit limit with the over-delivery tolerance amount only?

I appreciated your usual support, suggestions, consultations

entry.title: Posting to cost centers of different company code
entry.content: Dears I would like to know the  applicability to goods issue from company code A  (warehouse stock ) with  201 to another  cost center  related to another company code ?

entry.title: Want to start SAP Digital Skills Initiative towards Obtaining SAP Certification
entry.content:
Dear Concerned,

I am a Qualified Chartered Management Accountant (CMA) looking to switch my carrier towards SAP Consultancy.

Your support is highly appreciated in this regard.

entry.title: Balancing Field "Profit Center" in line item 006 not filled
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am trying to post Logistic invoice verification with unplanned delivery cost through EDI (RD04). After maintaining all the entries I am getting the error - 

'Balancing Field "Profit Center" in line item 006 not filled'

Message no. GLT2201

Diagnosis

The field Profit Center marked as balancing is not filled with any value in line item 006, even after document splitting.

System Response

The document cannot be posted.

Procedure

First check your entries.

Additional causes could be:

No value can be derived for this field from the current document data.

You have entered a document type that is not designed for this business purpose.

any suggestions on how to solve this will be appreciated...

Regards,

Ajinkya.

entry.title: FV50 Closing cost center
entry.content:
Earlier, while entering a journal entry using FV50, the user received a soft warning message. However, now during the posting, the user does not receive this message anymore. The user still wants to see this soft warning message.

We have checked the validation part using the table message class and message number but did not find the related validation. I also tried to find documents on this issue but couldn't locate anything specific. I am still investigating the validation part.

Can anyone tell me how to resolve this issue

entry.title: Transação para gerar o Balanço diferente da F.01 e FC10N
entry.content:
Bom dia,

Alguém pode me informar outra opção para gerar o Balanço, que não seja a F.01 e FC10N?

Necessidade de relatório com maior período de comparação.

Desde já, obrigada.

entry.title: FS00 - Alterar característica conta contábil
entry.content:
Boa noite, alguém já passou por esse cenário e pode me orientar?

Tenho uma conta contábil criada em duas empresas, e em cada empresa ela tem uma característica. Ou seja, em uma empresa essa conta é razão e na outra empresa é uma conta de conciliação de cliente. Como proceder para equalizar para que ambas tenham a mesma caracteristica de razão ou de cliente? Além da avaliar o impacto no processo do negócio, tecnicamente no FI acredito que a conta a ser alterada não pode ter saldo. Mais algum outro detalhe? Se tiver saldo, como devo proceder?

Desde já, agradeço.

entry.title: FS00 - Change G/L Account Characteristic
entry.content:
Good evening, has anyone been through this scenario and can guide me?

I have a ledger account created in two companies, and in each company it has a characteristic. That is, in one company this account is a ledger account and in the other company it is a customer reconciliation account.
How do you equalize so that both have the same reason or customer characteristic? In addition to evaluating the impact on the business process, technically in FI I believe that the account to be changed cannot have a balance. Any other details? If I have a balance, what should I do?

entry.title: CJI4/CJI4N how to display statistical WBS elements
entry.content:
CJI4/CJI4N: does not display individual plan items on the WBS elements which are statistical.

Note: customizing has been checked according to KBA 1889941 - CJI4 doesn't show any value in certain version.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Validation for BP reconciliation account
entry.content:
Hi All,

Any idea how to add the checking for reconciliation account of BP? (Vendor and customer)

I have multiple accounts, but I want to restrict the account for specific BP type. So I want to add a customized checking here. I try to use SAPMF02K and SAPMF02D, but it can't trigger the coding part when I change the account and save it. Not sure it suit for S4 1809 version or not. Please help.

entry.title: Project WBS element budget exceeded - Message no. BP603
entry.content:
Hi SAP Project System Experts,

I am reaching out to request your help and support in our SAP PS AVAC analysis.

We're encountering challenges in PS budget. Where, system is throwing budget exceeded error for many WBS elements, despite the budget not actually being exceeded. In some cases MRP and project execution have begun before budget release(CJ32). And CJ32 is now preventing us from releasing the WBS due to a budget exceedance error, despite the budget not actually being exceeded.

We are having BOM structure as follows. And here I have taken an example for Semi finished product BOM.

We are posting consumption through production orders for this W-Code BOM. After this consumption, once the W-code stock is available, we will proceed to post the outbound delivery.

Please find detailed steps below for Material consumptions and Sales outbound delivery:

  • We procure B-Code materials and formulated a W-Code BOM to utilize them effectively.
  • Upon confirming the production order for W-Code, the system proceeded to consume the B-Code materials and manufacture the W-Code product. During this stage, cost element 401009 was debited and cost element 401002 was credited, both associated with their respective WBS elements, resulting in a net zero balance in “cji3”.
  • Following material consumption, we initiated outbound delivery, where the system debited cost element 401003 against the relevant WBS element.

I have attached screenshots of the AVAC and accounting entries for your review. These images clearly show two debit postings of cost elements with associated WBS allocations, as well as one credit posting of a cost element also tied to a specific WBS.

Budget AVAC for reference WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03

Accounting entries for Production order confirmation.

Accounting entries for Outbound delivery

As checked in SAP report “S_ALR_87013558” & “CJI3”, the cost of WBS VT/ESP/300.01.03.03 is below the budget of INR 30,000.

Report: S_ALR_87013558

CJI3

Could you please assist us in reviewing the situation where we are unable to activate AVAC due to exceeding our budget?

We are encountering a similar challenge in our multi-level BOM, where the system accumulates costs across each BOM level without accounting for credits to AVAC, resulting in budget exceeded errors.

As shown in below example, the total cost of the finished product is INR 1000. However, when consuming the first SFG, AVAC calculates the cost as INR 700 & 300, and when consuming the FG, the system calculates an additional INR 1000, resulting in a budget exceeded error.

I've already escalated this to SAP, and they advised implementing the specified S_Notes. Subsequently, we executed CJBW, CJBN, and CJEN as instructed by SAP. However, the issue persists despite these actions.

S_Notes:
1594484
1038917
3028730
2795283

We kindly request your guidance to ensure if we are correctly following the procedures for the PS module and not missing any activity here?

Thank you,
Yash (FI)

entry.title: Linking Dimensions across different models to pick the current master data status
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Planning, we have a requirement to fetch the store status based on the date filtered in the story.

In the below example, Store A is under renovation for Period 1 of 2024 to Period 3 of 2024
Store B is closed in Period 4
Store C was Already Open
Store D is a new store opened in Period 2 of 2024.

User will maintain the data in a custom table

 


Hence, the requirement is that lets assume we are in period 9 of the 2024.

If a person runs the period filter in the dashboard from Period 1 to Period 4, the below store status should be visible in the table, based on the data mentioned in the table

StoreStatus
ARenovation
BClosed
COpen
DNew

In the transaction data being sent to SAC, we have the store code & the posting date being sent.

We do not want to load this store status on the transactional data, since business might change the store status for backdated dates.

E.g., in July 2024, they might change the status of a store of Jan 2024.

Hence, based on the data in the table, we want the system to use a similar formula like VLOOKUP, where system would pick the status mentioned in the above table based on the store code & the period combination.

@N1kh1l if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: If we post a transaction if there are two ledgers. How many accounting entries are posted in s4 hana
entry.content: If we post a accounting entry how many entries are posted if we have two ledgers leading and non leading ledger.

entry.title: One chart of depreciation
entry.content: Can we assign one chart of depriciation to multiple company codes with different countries

entry.title: Postings for account type M ( posting key 99 ) during the entering invoice.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I quite new in FI.

I have the problem that during simulation of incoming invoice I have some value posted with posting key 99 to material account.

Question what is the reason to post to this account? Can I somehow found from where is this difference is coming?

GR for value 21 954,24 EUR

Invoice simulation: Posted to account 307110 - 22024,03 EUR, and difference to material account.

Thank you,

entry.title: Bank balances are not triggering into CFA
entry.content:
Hi 

After receiving statements from the bank, the balances are not triggering into CFA, could anyone help me on this.

Thanks,

Sai charan
